title.en: Under such circumstances, the Heavenly Fire Sec...

content.en:
The fall of the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch caused everyone in the Heavenly Fire Sect to fall into complete chaos, and also let the Heavenly Monarch and Divine Generals of the Heavenly Fire Sect know that the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch had already left the Heavenly Fire Sect, and those who remained in the Heavenly Fire Sect were only clones.

All of a sudden, many Heavenly Monarchs and Divine Generals fled from the Heavenly Fire Sect one after another, not daring to stay here any longer.

In case Ye Tian directly killed the Heavenly Fire Sect, they would be like ants, and they wouldn't be able to stop it at all!

Besides, they had no enmity with Ye Tian, maybe they escaped from the Heavenly Fire Sect, and Ye Tian would not chase them down at all.

Under such circumstances, the Heavenly Fire Sect completely collapsed.

And the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch, who was hiding somewhere in the universe, was extremely frightened, he was too scared.

He knew that the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch was secretly hiding, but he was still found and killed by Ye Tian.

And what about him?

"Wanfa Daozi will definitely not find me!

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch muttered.

He hid in the underground in the depths of a starry sky continent, and used various formations to hide his whereabouts, completely concealed his breath, and changed his soul breath, and that soul class chaos treasure was on his body.

With many means arranged, the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch breathed a sigh of relief.

In his opinion, even if the True Ancestor came, don't even think about finding him.

But in the dark, he still had a trace of worry.

Abrupt.

A terrifying sword light came down with a single blow, directly destroying the formations he had arranged one by one.

Then, a familiar figure appeared in his sight.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, it's impossible, I've arranged so many means, and even changed the soul aura, how can you find me???" Lieyang Tianjun couldn't believe it.

A few minutes later.

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch fell, and from beginning to end, he didn't know how Ye Tian found him.

Ye Tian didn't say anything, he didn't want the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch to die with the truth, in case the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch leaked his secret before he died, wouldn't he lose a hole card?

The less people know about the Myriad Void Life Technique, the better, although he also knows that this secret cannot be kept forever, there may be many people who can crack the Myriad Void Life Technique in the chaos, but there are definitely not a few people who can perceive the Myriad Void Life Technique.

For example, some powerful true monarchs, some peerless Tianjiao with special abilities, and so on.

However, Ye Tian's killing of the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch was still leaked.

This was leaked out through the clone before the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch died, and Ye Tian had no way to stop it, unless he could kill the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch in an instant.

But he obviously can't do it!

As soon as the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch died, the Heavenly Fire Sect was considered to exist in name only, unless the next batch of Heavenly Fire Sect powerhouses re-entered the Great Universe, otherwise in this era, the name of the Heavenly Fire Sect would no longer exist.

Soon after.

Several major forces invaded the headquarters of the Heavenly Fire Sect and completely destroyed the Heavenly Fire Sect, and many of the resources of the Heavenly Fire Sect were also divided.

The territory of the Heavenly Fire Sect was also completely divided and occupied by several major forces.

Void Heaven Temple.

Ye Tian is back, this time he went out and killed the two Heavenly Monarchs, and the harvest is incomparably rich, the cultivation resources of the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch are not much, but there are a lot of other resources, such as some weapons, secret art inheritance, rare materials, and so on.

Ye Tian exchanged most of the things for the resources he needed, and the whole person became rich again.

Among these treasures, there are two that Ye Tian is more satisfied with, one is the Soul Chaos Arcana called the Hundred Changing Illusion Mirror, which can change the soul breath and defend against soul attacks, and the value is comparable to a top-notch Chaos Arcana, and even the value is not less than half a Dao weapon.

The second treasure is a heritage, the inheritance of chaotic supernatural powers.

"Eternal fire is not extinguished!"

This is a very powerful Chaos Divine Power, and it is an offensive Chaos Divine Power, ranking 25th in the Chaos Divine Power.

Eternal Fire Extinguishing contains the Eternal Avenue and the Avenue of Fire, and nothing does not burn, once you hit the Eternal Fire Extinguishment, if you can't extinguish it, it will continue to burn until it burns out your body and soul.

The ever-changing illusion realm and the inheritance of eternal non-extinguishing all come from the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch, and the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch also walks the avenue of fire, and it is estimated that he also wants to cultivate the eternal immortal extinguishing the fire.

It's a pity that the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch doesn't meet the cultivation conditions, otherwise he will be able to practice this chaotic supernatural power, and he is even expected to hit the top few of the Heavenly Monarch list.

However, now it is cheaper Ye Tian!

"I just lack the finale of the attacking Chaos Divine Power, and the Eternal Immortal Fire is ranked 25th in the Chaos Divine Power, which is so suitable for me!" Ye Tian was quite excited.

This is a Chaos Divine Power that even the Void Heaven Temple doesn't have, if it is converted by points, this Chaos Divine Power is worth at least 500,000 points, or even more.

In the Void Heaven Temple, the Chaos Divine Powers in the 2,000 or so rank all require thousands of points, the Chaos Divine Powers in the top 100 need at least 10,000 points, and the Chaos Divine Powers in the top 50 need at least tens of thousands.

And the Chaos Divine Power in the top 30 is definitely more than hundreds of thousands of points, or even more.

As for the first few Chaos Divine Powers, it is simply too high, and I don't even dare to expect extravagance, if it is measured by points, I can't get it without millions of points or even tens of millions of points.

Ye Tian didn't expect that kind of chaotic supernatural power, and he was able to get such a powerful chaotic supernatural power as Eternal Immortal Extinguishing, which was already extremely lucky.

"Eternal Flame requires the assistance of a top-level innate origin thing like Eternal Flame to cultivate, the problem of talent is not a problem for me, I only need to find Eternal Flame to start cultivating!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Eternal Flame was very rare, and Ye Tian did not find this kind of treasure on the system of the Void Heaven Temple.

In desperation, Ye Tian had no choice but to dispel the idea of cultivating Eternal without extinguishing the fire, after all, even if he found the Eternal Flame, he might not be qualified to trade.

According to his understanding, the Eternal Flame and other top-level innate origin things are very versatile, and their value is many times more than that of high-level innate origin things, and if it is measured by Void Heaven Points, it is definitely more than 1 million points.

With Ye Tian's current wealth, he can't afford to exchange it at all!

If he scrapes together now, he can only scrape together seven or eight hundred thousand points, and many things can't be traded, and they are all treasures that are very useful to him.

Practice!

Practice!

Ye Tian fell into a frenzied cultivation and constantly improved his strength.

Only when the strength is strong can you harvest more treasures, and only then can you hope to get the Eternal Flame.

And just like that, millions of years have passed.
